suppress.notes: CVE-2026-42154 is attached through an incorrect NVD CPE association between the Micrometer Prometheus registry adapter and the Prometheus server product. The scanned artifact is the Java instrumentation adapter io.micrometer:micrometer-registry-prometheus:1.15.4; it does not contain or run the affected Prometheus server. This rule is package- and CVE-scoped and must be reviewed when either dependency version or NVD mapping changes.
